Metadata.title: Quiet Riots
Metadata.description: Organose yia koina themata. Vrei tous anthropous sou. Dras mazee.

Footer.mission: Na allaksoume perissotero gia to kalyteri stin zoi mas apo oti tolmame na fantasthoume oti einai dynato.
Footer.powered: Quiet Riots · Powered by OpenClaw AI Agent

Home.headline: I allagi den prepei na einai forthoriaki gia na einai dynastiki
Home.description: Vrei allous pou echoun ta idia themata. Dras mazee. Quiet Riots syndei anthropous yia koina frustrations ke metavali ta paraponomena se kollektiki drasi.
Home.findYourIssueDesc: Psakse yia opoiodipote frustration — trains, broadband, NHS, climate. An yparchi, tha sou dixoume posa alli echo ti diki tou.
Home.useThePivotDesc: Di to idio thema aniamesa se oles tis organiseis, i ola ta themata se mia organisei. San tango dancers pou alazoun fora.
Home.takeActionDesc: Idees, draseis, ke koinotita — prosopiki sti sina kai stis dexiotites sou. Mikres draseis prosthetoume sti megali allagi.
Home.missionQuote: "Na allaksoume perissotero gia to kalyteri stin zoi mas apo oti tolmame na fantasthoume oti einai dynato."
Home.basedOn: Based on the 2014 book Quiet Riots by Simon Darling

Issues.title: Themata
Issues.subtitle: {count} themata mesa se {categoryCount} kategories. Vrei to diko sou.
Issues.noResults: Den vrikiskan themata. Dokimase alliterotero anazitisi i kategoria.

IssueDetail.gatherEvidenceDesc: Tireodimi ti ginete — parethetise Live i dimosievse photos, videos, ke links.
IssueDetail.riotReelsDesc: Smilik ke ironik videos pou fixoun to pneuma afti tis Quiet Riot.
IssueDetail.expertsDesc: Parakalousan volunteers pou pigoun pio vatha — metafrastes, specialists, media leads, legal advisors.
IssueDetail.pendingBanner: Afti i Quiet Riot einai ypia avaziosi — mporis na sinlexis stoicheia ke na dimazis tis skepseis sou oso iparchi ypio avaziosi.

Organisations.title: Organiseis
Organisations.subtitle: Peripata organiseis ke di ti themata echo anthropoi me kathe mia.
Organisations.noResults: Den vrikiskan organiseis gia afti tin kategoria.

OrgDetail.paretoDesc: Ligata themata sinithes logatari gia 80% olon ton paraponimaton. Ta top themata kato einai ordensmena me to numero ton anthropon pou epithenontai.

ActionInitiatives.title: Action Projects
ActionInitiatives.subtitle: {count} {count, plural, one {project} other {projects}} pou analambanoyn services gia kollektiki drasi.
ActionInitiatives.noResults: Den vrikiskan action projects. Dokimase alliterotero filter.

ActionInitiativeDetail.wantToSupport: Theles na analabis afto to sevisu?
ActionInitiativeDetail.topUpFirst: Prosthesi ligata sta portofoli sou proto gia na arxiseis.
ActionInitiativeDetail.createAccountPrompt: Dimurgise logarizmo ke fortose to portofoli sou gia na analabis afto to sevisu.
ActionInitiativeDetail.completedMessage: Afto to project echi ginei {status}. Evharisto se olous tous {count} metexontes!

Assistants.title: Voithoi
Assistants.subtitle: {count} zeygaria AI agents ke anthropines organoses voithoyn rioters na paron draseis.

AssistantDetail.openRole: I rolo tou human organiser einai anixi se oyon ehei pathos gia afti tin kategoria. Dilo to endiaferon sou kato.

Wallet.title: To Portofoli Sou
Wallet.createPromptDesc: Dimurgise eklevthero logarizmo gia na fortoseis to portofoli sou ke na analabis services gia action projects.

Profile.title: To Profil Sou
Profile.findIssues: Vrei themata pou se noiazoun ke symvathei stin kinisi.
Profile.noConnectedAccounts: Kanena logarizmo syndemenio akomi. Eiselthe me Google i Facebook gia na syndesis to logarizmo sou.
Profile.cannotUnlinkLast: Den mporis na aposyndehis to moni logarizmo sou
Profile.deactivateConfirm: Isai siguro oti theles na apenergopoiiseis to logarizmo sou? Mporis na to epanenerigopoiseis mesa se 30 imeres.
Profile.unlinkPhoneConfirm: Isai siguro oti theles na aposyndehis to tilefono sou? Den tha ichis tin dynati na eiselthis me afto.
Profile.codeSentToPhone: Enas kodikas alaithias stalhike sta WhatsApp sou.
Profile.cannotUnlinkPhone: Den mporis na aposyndehis tin moni methodo alythefsias sou
Profile.passwordTooShort: O kodicos prepei na echi tiyloton 10 charaktires
Profile.passwordBreached: Aftos o kodicos echi emfanisteei se data breach. Parakaloo epilekse allon.

Auth.signInSubtitle: Sindethite sto logariasmo sas Quiet Riots
Auth.joinSubtitle: Organothite yia koines thematikes. Energhiste mazi.
Auth.signInLinkSent: Stapilame sto email sas isa link sindesmou. Patirate to link gia na sinexisete.
Auth.signUpLinkSent: Stapilame sto email sas isa link sindesmou. Patirate to link gia na dimiourgisete ton logariasmo sas.
Auth.verifyDesc: Isa link syndesmou exei stapilei sto email sas. Patirate to link gia na sinexisete.
Auth.errorConfig: Iparxi provlima me tin konfigurasi tou servir.
Auth.errorAccess: I prosaggisi ixe apokleisthi. Issos den exete adeia syndesmou.
Auth.errorVerification: To link syndesmou ixe lixi i exei idi xrisimopiiithei.
Auth.emailBody: Patirate to koumpi parakatho gia na syndethite sto logariasmo sas. To link lixi se 24 ores.
Auth.emailIgnore: An den ithesate to email afto, mporeite na to ignorisite.
Auth.codeSent: Isa kodikas epivevaiosis exei stapilei sto WhatsApp sas.
Auth.passwordTooShort: O kodikas prepei na exei i poll 10 xaraktires
Auth.emailAlreadyExists: Idh iparxi logariasmo me afto to email
Auth.noPasswordSet: Den exei tethei kodikas. Xrisimopieite magic link i tethite kodikas sto profil sas.
Auth.passwordBreached: Aftos o kodikas exei emfanisthi se mia diavoli dedomenon. Parakalite epilexte allon.
Auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Isigeite to email sas kai tha sas stiloume isa link gia na ipothesete ton kodikas.
Auth.resetEmailSentDesc: An iparxi logariasmo me afto to email, exume steilei isa link ipothesisis kodiku. Elegxte tin isigogin sas.
Auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: Epilexte neon kodikas gia ton logariasmo sas.
Auth.resetPasswordSuccessDesc: O kodikas sas exei ipothethei. Mporite na sindetheithe me ton neon kodikas sas.
Auth.resetEmailBody: Patirate to koumpi parakatho gia na ipothesete ton kodikas sas. To link lixi se 1 ora.
Auth.resetEmailIgnore: An den ithesate ipothesi kodiku, mporeite na ignorisite to email afto.

GlobalError.title: Kati pige strava
GlobalError.description: Evine aperimenipto sfalma. I omada mas exei eidopoiithei.

NotFound.description: I selida pou psaxnete den iparxi i exei metakinihthi.

Pivot.seeIssueAcross: Dite "{issueName}" se ola ta omoia organisma:

Transactions.title: Prosina Sinallages
Transactions.empty: Kamia sinallagi akoma. Epizarothite to portofoli sas gia na ksekinisite!

Feed.empty: Kamia dimosiefssi akoma. Isthe i proti me kinihma!

Actions.noResults: Kamia energhia tairiazei sta filtro sas. Prospathiste na prosaplothixete tin epilogh sas.

Reels.empty: Kamio reel akoma. Isthe i proti na ipovoli eno!
Reels.submitPrompt: Exete isan smisiako video pou perigraaphi afto to thema?
Reels.submitSuccess: Evxaristume! To reel sas exei ipovli gia epitheorisi.

TopUp.simulated: Similiomeni epizarosi gia dokimi. Pragmatikes pliromis erxontai sigo-sigo.

Pay.insufficientFunds: Aneparkia fonda. Gemise to portofoli sou proto.
Pay.toKeepSupporting: gia na sinehisis ti sinergeia sta ipiresies.

Claim.success: Efharisto! Sximatiame tin endiaferontà sou ya ti rolo {name}. Tha epikoinonisume mazì sou.
Claim.placeholder: Yia ti tha ithan epituhos stis rolo {name}? (epilogio)

Evidence.photoFormats: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF. Max 4 MB to kathe ena.

ProfileEdit.title: Epitheorisi profil
ProfileEdit.skillsHint: Diahorizonmene me komata. Voithá na se syndesi me anaferes energies.

CookieConsent.title: Proflises cookie
CookieConsent.description: Hrisimopoiume cookies gia na se kratisume sisigmeno kai na veltiosi tin empeiría sou. Ta analyti cookies mas voithane na katalavume pos ftinetai i selida.
CookieConsent.essentialDescription: Aporaitita gia ti litourgia tis selidas. Den ine dinatón na apenergopoithun.
CookieConsent.analyticsDescription: Voithá mas na katalavume pos tin xrisimopois i selida opstin na tin veltiosi.

Onboarding.interestsSubtitle: Epilexe tis kategoris pou se noiazun. Tha sou dixnume synandisis thema kai energies.
Onboarding.interestsSelected: {count, plural, =0 {Ohi kategoris epilegmenes} one {1 kategoria epilegmeni} other {# kategoris epilegmenes}}
Onboarding.languageSubtitle: Ehoume anixneysi ti glossa tou ipiretiri sou. Boris na ti allaxis edo.
Onboarding.countrySubtitle: Ayto mas voithá na sou dixnume topika thema kai na orisume to nomisma sou.
Onboarding.countrySkip: I lista chronon den ine diathesimi. Boris na to orizis sto profil sou argotara.
Onboarding.skipCountry: Paralipsi — Tha to valo sto profil mou argotara

SuggestPage.title: Protinagi Nea Quiet Riot
SuggestPage.subtitle: Den vris to thema sou? Protinagi nea Quiet Riot kai tha to epitheorisoume.

SuggestForm.nameLabel: Onoma gia tin Quiet Riot sou
SuggestForm.namePlaceholder: p.x. Kostí Kinitis Dedomenon, Krisis Potholeon...
SuggestForm.descriptionPlaceholder: Pis mas giati gia ayto to thema...
SuggestForm.publicRecognition: Dihksi me san to Proto Quiet Rioter (afairese tin epilogi gia na minis anonimo)
SuggestForm.successMessage: I Quiet Riot sou ine tora sto xrono periodon. Enas Setup Guide tha tin epitheorisei sto ora. Boris na sintaxis apodixi kai na dimiourjis tin diki sou siskepsi os afti epitheorinetai.

RejectionReasons.title: Yia Ti Quiet Riots Aporipio
RejectionReasons.subtitle: Katanosi tis diadikasias epitheorisis
RejectionReasons.intro: Kathi protinagi gia nea Quiet Riot epitheorinetai apo ena Setup Guide gia na ypisteteri oti iparhi sti platforma kai ine dinatón na kanei pragmatiki diaforá. Edo ine i ligoi pou mia protinagi isos na min ine engkekrimeni:
RejectionReasons.closeToExistingP1: An i protinagi sou ine poli omia me mia Quiet Riot pou iparhei idi, tha synchisoume tin protinagi sou sti iparhoysa. Ayto kratin ti kinotita fokusiméni kai mpuli tin diashkisi. Oso pio poli kosmi piso apo mia Quiet Riot, toso megali i epifanias.
RejectionReasons.closeToExistingP2: Otan ayto symvinei, tha prostethis i-omatik sti yparhousa Quiet Riot opstin na arhisis na kinis energies amesos.
RejectionReasons.aboutPeopleP1: Quiet Riots eime sxetika me koina thema, ohi ya to stohinemono atoma. Fokoumetai se sistimika provlimata — pragmata opus kakim platoforma, auxani energeiakos kostós, i aneparkis iatrikí — pará apo prosopika apraxies me sygkekrimena atoma.
RejectionReasons.aboutPeopleP2: An sistrai gia éna sygkekrimeno atomo i prosopikotita, prospathi na to plaisiosis os to ypokiní thema. Gia paradigma, anti gia stohinemo CEOs, protinagi mia Quiet Riot ya tis praktikes tis eteria.
RejectionReasons.illegalP1: Den borime na kserume Quiet Riots pou prosferune i organoni paranomi aktivitites. Ayto perilamvani kathi ti paravin ta efarmoztea nomima, prosferune via, i ine dinatón na stathmi atoma se kindino.
RejectionReasons.otherP1: Epokhi mia protinagi isos na min iparhi ya alo logo — isos ine poly asafis, i o Setup Guide hriazete i pliroforís. Si ayts tis periptossis, tha lavi sximati pou exigni yia ti aporipio kai ti boris na kanis meta.
RejectionReasons.whatNextIntro: An i protinagi sou aporipio, bori pantote na:
RejectionReasons.reframe: Plaisiosi kai próva xana — allagi to onoma i tin perigrafi ya na kalitira iparhi ta kategoria
RejectionReasons.joinExisting: Sindesi sto yparhousa Quiet Riot — to thema sou isos idi na kalipti
RejectionReasons.replyGuide: Apokrisi ston Setup Guide — an nomizis oti i aporipio itani sfalma, stilsi sximati pou na exigni tin perpitosi sou

AnonymousInfo.title: Anonima Proto Rioters
AnonymousInfo.subtitle: Ti simeni to na ise anonimo
AnonymousInfo.intro: Otan kápios arhizi nea Quiet Riot, ginetai to Proto Quiet Rioter. Ayto ine badge tis onomasías — to atomo pou ixe tolarmi na milisi proto.
AnonymousInfo.choosingIntro: Den inai ólos pou thelun to onoma tus na ine sxetik me éna thema vima. Ayto ine olotelus kali. Otan to Proto Quiet Rioter epileksi na mini anonimo:
AnonymousInfo.choosingHidden: To onoma tus kai i eikona tus profil apokripontai apo tin selida tis diplis
AnonymousInfo.choosingBadge: Enas anonimo badge exinetai andi, opstin kosmi na gnorizi oti kápios to arhizi hris na gnorizi pios
AnonymousInfo.choosingGuides: Oi Setup Guides xni gnorizi pios to arhizi (gia skopi moderasyon)
AnonymousInfo.choosingChange: To Proto Rioter borin na allaksi tin gnimi tons argotara kai na epileksi na ine vima anignoristone
AnonymousInfo.whyIntro: Yparhun poli kiri ligi na minis anonimo:
AnonymousInfo.whySensitive: To thema ine evaisthito i kontrovérsio
AnonymousInfo.whyWork: Ypiretis se eteria sxetik me to thema
AnonymousInfo.whyCause: Protimi na afisis tin aitia na mili ya ton eaton tis
AnonymousInfo.changingP1: An arhisis mia Quiet Riot anonimo ala argotara apofasisis na se thelis na anignorisononte, boris na allaksi tin proflisi sou opoiadhipote stigmi mesa sta problimata sou i stilnontas sximati sto Setup Guide.

Setup.title: Odigos Kalitsias
Setup.subtitle: Episkepsi kai dioikisi Quiet Riots protasis
Setup.pendingCount: {count, plural, one {1 protási} other {# protáseis}} perímenon epískepsi
Setup.noSuggestions: Kamiá protási se aftí ti katiggoría

Admin.title: Diítisi
Admin.subtitle: Dioíkisi khristón ke rólon
Admin.searchPlaceholder: Anazítisi vásii ónomatos, email, í tiléfono...
Admin.noRoleHolders: Kanínas khristís den éhi anatheti rólo akómi.

FirstRioterInfo.title: Prótos Quiet Rioter
FirstRioterInfo.subtitle: Ti símaíni na xekinis éna Quiet Riot
FirstRioterInfo.intro: Kávdi Quiet Riot xekiná me éna átomo — ton Próto Quiet Rioter. Aftó eíne to átomo pu éhi to thárros na miléxí yia éna théma ke na xekinis mia kínisi yia allayí.
FirstRioterInfo.whatIntro: I gégonos áti oí próti átoma na sinígnoun éna théma érkhete me ídii anágnorisi:
FirstRioterInfo.whatBadge: Éna níaniko Próto Quiet Rioter nímva stin selída tu thésmatos
FirstRioterInfo.whatRecognition: I epilogí na íste dimósia anagnoríste í na paramíne anínymi
FirstRioterInfo.whatJoined: Aftómati iditótita os to próto átomo pu énose sto Quiet Riot
FirstRioterInfo.whatNotifications: Emirísmata ótan i protasí sas epiṁkopí, egkrithí, í pénasei zón
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilitiesTitle: Ti Perímenete na Kánoun oi Próti Rioters?
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilitiesIntro: I gégonos Prótos Rioter eíne níaniko timís, óchi vára. Dén ipárkhi apostólí, alá efarmoguó Próti Rioters na:
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilityChampion: Ypistatheíste to théma os to xanáloyn me állis pu éndiafértunde
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilityEvidence: Koynótite stoíkhea ke istorías pu dimiuryan to próvlima
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilityWelcome: Kalosírte néa mélí pu énose sto Quiet Riot
FirstRioterInfo.recognitionIntro: Ótan protothéte éna néo Quiet Riot, epiléyete pós thélete na anagnoristhíte:
FirstRioterInfo.recognitionPublic: Dimósia — to ónomá sas ke to profíl sas emfanízonde stin selída tu thésmatos os Prótos Rioter
FirstRioterInfo.recognitionAnonymous: Anínymo — éna anínymi níaniko emfanízete antí, prostatévontas tín taytótitá sas
FirstRioterInfo.recognitionChange: Boríte na allákste tin protími sas aneti ótan thélite díameso tu isodíou sas í epikoinonónda me éna Odigo Kalitsías
FirstRioterInfo.howP1: Típota próta éna néo Quiet Riot díameso tu istothótir í tu WhatsApp bot. An i protasí sas egkrithí apó tin Odigí Kalitsías, gínestae i Prótos Quiet Rioter yia aftó to théma.
FirstRioterInfo.howP2: I protasí sas pénasei díameso mia diadikasía epidosopíiseos ópu i Odigí Kalitsías eléngkhoun aftí tíroun ta odigía. Boríne na zitísun perissóteres pliroforíes, na prothinoun énosi me éna ipárkkhon théma, í na tin egkríne na pénasei zón.

Share.title: I Metoxí sou sta Quiet Riots
Share.profileLink: Mathé perissótera ya ti metoxí sou sta Quiet Riots →
Share.heroTitle: I Pakosmía Metoxí sou sta Quiet Riots
Share.heroSubtitle: Kátje Quiet Rioter se ólo to kósmo proféretai mía metoxí sta Quiet Riots — i etería afí.
Share.ownershipDesc: Ótan échis metoxí, echis kinír éna pragmatikó méros tis Quiet Riots. Aftó den ine token, badge, i metafórá — ine mía gnísía metoxí se mía Británikí Limited Company, ekdothí sto Companies House.
Share.ownershipPoint1: Gínese nomikí sumtoxí tis Quiet Riots
Share.ownershipPoint2: I metoxí sou auxánete tin axía óso i etería auxánete
Share.ownershipPoint3: Isós na lávís dimarísmatá an i etería dianémis kérdí
Share.ownershipPoint4: Échis dikaiómata sumtoxí ypó to Británikó nómo eteriós
Share.considerationDesc: Ypó to Británikó nómo eteriós (Companies Act 2006), i metoxés den boreí na ekdothún dórea. Éna onomastikó plirómá — kalúmeno consideration — ine aparétito ya i metoxí na ine nomikós kyría.
Share.considerationAmount: I logisthentí ya ti metoxí sou ine 10 lepta (i to ísodynamo sti topikí sas nomísmá).
Share.considerationWallet: Aftó afaireítai apó to Quiet Riots wallet sou ótan prohorísís.
Share.considerationRefund: An i aitísi sou aporrhiftí, to 10p epistréfetai aftómata sto wallet sou.
Share.growthSharesTitle: Pós Lévi Aftó se Diáfores Timológisís
Share.growthSharesDesc: I metoxí sou chrisimopoií mía domí growth share — mía idiaítiri klása pou gínete axiólogi apó énta pánó apó mía órió timológísi tis etería. Aftó simáni elála fóro stin óra tis ekdósís.
Share.preSeedDesc: Metoxés ekdothún se onomastikí axía. Plirónís 10p. Ochi simantikó filológikó gígonos.
Share.seedDesc: Ídía onomastikí axía. Growth share hurdle orízetai pánó apó tin tréxousa timológísi.
Share.seriesADesc: Pre-emption dikaiómata afáirethun ya to pool metoxís chronáftion. Hurdle eláhatí tin tréxousa axía.
Share.seriesBDesc: Growth share hurdle asphalizí periorisméni tréxousa axía óchí apó tin ypsílí timológísi tis etería.
Share.seriesCDesc: To pool metoxís chronáftion ine orísmeni posostó tou cap table. Ochí néa dilutive ekdósís.
Share.ipoDesc: Metoxés chronáftion metatassoyntai se ádií emporevómenes metoxés. Fóros kapitaliakaí apólabís isós na fáí stin pólisí.
Share.responsibilitiesDesc: To échein metoxí érxete me kapíes euthinés:
Share.responsibility1: I filologiké ypoxrésís exártitai apó tin xóra tís katoikísís sas — sumvulevtítí qualified simpýli
Share.responsibility2: Ochi éggyí oti i etería tha ftási ópoiadípoti timológísi
Share.responsibility3: I domí metoxís isós na prosarmoththí ótan i etería auxánetai
Share.responsibility4: Aftó den ine nomikí, filologikí, i epitheóritiki sýmvuli
Share.disclaimer1: Aftó ine mía aplopiaí exígisí — óchi nomikí, filologikí, i epitheóritiki sýmvuli.
Share.disclaimer2: Káthe xrístiou filologiké ypoxrésís exártitai apó tin xóra tís katoikísís tus.
Share.disclaimer3: Ochi éggyí oti i etería tha ftási ópoiadípoti timológísi.
Share.disclaimer4: I domí metoxís isós na prosarmoththí ótan i etería auxánetai.
Share.disclaimer5: I xrísti tha prépi na sumvulevthún me qualified sympúlis stin idía xóra tus.
Share.eligibilityDesc: Ya na isopoíisís ya tin proforá metoxís, chreiázesai na:
Share.eligibilityVerified: Isthe apodíkti xrístiou (ónoma ke ilektronikó tachidromío i tileféno epivevíomeno)
Share.eligibilityMet: Isthe epixeírioi ya ti metoxí sas!
Share.proceedDesc: Étím na ginite sumtoxóí? To 10p consideration tha afairitháf apó to wallet sas.
Share.proceedConfirm: Éna onomastikó plirómá 10p tha afairitháf apó to wallet sas. Aftó ine nomikí aparétito ya i metoxí na ine kyría.
Share.proceedSuccess: I aitísi sas ypovatthíí! Énas Share Guide tha tin anaskriní sýntoma.
Share.insufficientFunds: Xreisiázesai tomáhiston 10p sto wallet sou ya na prohorísis.
Share.declineDesc: An then thélis metoxí, boríz na aporrhípsís to prófora permáenta. Tipóta plirómá then tha spistaí.
Share.declineConfirm: Isthe sigurí? Aftó ine permáento ke den boreí na analiftí. Then tha sas proférthí akómi metoxí potá.
Share.withdrawDesc: Akinítísate tin aitísi sas ke láfte mía plíri epistrofí ton 10p.
Share.withdrawConfirm: Isthe sigurí? To 10p sas tha epistrafí sto wallet sas.
Share.withdrawSuccess: I aitísi sas ehí anaklithí. 10p ehí epistrafí sto wallet sas.
Share.reapplyDesc: I proígumi aitísi sas aporrhífthi. Boríte na epixyápsete me éna néo plirómá 10p.
Share.passwordDesc: To tmíma metoxís ine prosatatévmeno me kódiká ya tin aspháleia sas.
Share.identityDesc: Ya na oloklirósete tin aitísi metoxís sas, prépi na epiveviosúme tin tavtótita sas. Afti i pliroforía ine enkriptografimní ke apothikévtai aspháleia.
Share.identitySuccess: I tavtótita sas ypovatthíí ya epívafi.
Share.issueEligibilityBanner: Isthe epixeírioi ya ti metoxí sas
Share.issueRequestReceived: I zítisí sas eláfthi. Tha imétera sas se epafí se lígi óra.
